description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk monument, rectangular in shape with a slightly sloped top and set upon a multi-tiered stone base. The surface is mottled with patches of moss and lichen, giving it an aged, historic appearance. The front and rear faces feature engraved inscriptions, some of which are partially eroded but still legible, commemorating individuals. The base consists of two main steps, each with visible wear and discoloration from exposure to the elements. Fallen leaves and debris are scattered on the base, suggesting it is located outdoors, likely in a park or cemetery. The overall structure is solid and immovable, with no visible moving parts or interactive features.
description: A weathered stone obelisk monument with engraved inscriptions, set on a multi-tiered mossy stone base and surrounded by scattered leaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription panel and the layered stone base with moss and leaf debris.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, unadorned face of the obelisk and the sloped top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary inscription and the same multi-tiered base structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a blank face and visible weathering on the stone.
attribute_inscription: Engraved inscriptions are present on the front and rear faces, in English, with serif-style lettering. The text is partially eroded but mostly legible, commemorating individuals and dates.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and multi-tiered, consisting of two main stone steps with visible moss and weathering. The steps are broad and flat, with a slightly raised platform supporting the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and slightly sloped, with no decorative elements or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a paved stone platform with scattered fallen leaves, indicating an outdoor setting. No other notable features are immediately present.
